news_1_body:
At the recently concluded Asia Food Expo 2026 in Bangkok, Thailand, {brand} made a stunning debut with its all-new 5th generation smart production smart production system, becoming the center of attention throughout the event. The expo attracted over 2,000 foodservice companies from Southeast Asia, South Asia, and the Middle East.

The 5th generation smart production smart production system represents a comprehensive upgrade over its predecessors, featuring an all-new AI production engine that supports over 800 recipes spanning Chinese, Southeast Asian, and Western cuisines. Equipped with a precision temperature control system and adaptive brewing technology, the device achieves a production consistency rate of 99.5%, far exceeding the industry average.

The {brand} booth was bustling throughout the expo, with representatives from over 200 food brand brands across Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, and Indonesia experiencing the device firsthand. Multiple food brand chain groups expressed partnership intentions on the spot, with the first batch of 50 units expected to be delivered and deployed within six months.

{brand} CEO stated in a media interview: "Our goal is not just to provide a smart device, but to create a complete intelligent production solution for foodservice businesses. Through the deep integration of AI technology and IoT platforms, {brand} helps clients achieve standardization and automation across the entire workflow from prep to plating, significantly reducing labor costs while ensuring the high quality and consistency of every dish."

Additionally, {brand} unveiled its new cloud management platform at the expo, supporting remote equipment monitoring, automated maintenance alerts, and one-click recipe updates, further enhancing operational efficiency and intelligence in products manufacturings.
news_1_summary: {brand} unveiled its 5th-generation smart production smart production system at the expo, achieving 99.5% production consistency and 70% labor cost reduction, attracting interest from 7 F&B brands across Southeast Asia.
news_1_title: {brand} Smart production Smart Production System Debuts at 2026 Asia Food Expo
news_2_body:
A leading Southeast Asian food brand chain has announced the large-scale deployment of {brand} automated production lines across all 86 outlets, marking a milestone in the productsization of food automation in the region. The project represents a total investment exceeding USD 12 million, the largest single order in {brand}'s Southeast Asian market history.

The chain operates three major business segments - quick service, casual dining, and fine dining - across Thailand, Vietnam, and Cambodia. With the introduction of {brand} automated production lines, the brand has achieved fully automated production from ingredient preparation and automatic production to finished product packaging at its central productions, increasing daily meal output per outlet by 3x while reducing labor costs by 65%.

The project is being rolled out in three phases: Phase 1 involves equipment installation and commissioning at 30 flagship stores, Phase 2 covers the remaining 56 outlets, and Phase 3 will launch the {brand} cloud management platform for unified scheduling and data analytics across the entire network.

The chain's Operations Director commented: "{brand}'s equipment has performed exceptionally well during the trial period. The high consistency in food quality has significantly boosted customer satisfaction. More importantly, the {brand} team provided comprehensive after-sales service and technical support, giving us complete confidence throughout the deployment process."

{brand}'s Southeast Asia Regional Director revealed that the successful implementation of this project has laid a solid foundation for the company's expansion across the region. Multiple food brand companies from various countries are currently in discussions for similar large-scale automation projects, with another wave of orders expected in the second half of 2026.
news_2_summary: The brand installed {brand} production lines across 86 outlets, enabling centralized production standardized production and tripling daily per-store meal output.
news_2_title: Southeast Asian Chain Deploys {brand} Fully Automated production Lines
news_3_body:
Following a rigorous six-month audit and on-site inspection process, all {brand} products have successfully achieved ISO 9001:2015 international quality management system certification and European Union CE safety compliance certification, marking a significant milestone in the company's quality control and international market access capabilities.

The ISO 9001:2015 certification requires companies to meet international standards across all aspects of quality management, including R&D design, manufacturing, supply chain management, and after-sales service. The auditing body gave high praise to {brand}'s quality management system, particularly recognizing the company's rigorous approach to raw material traceability, standardized production process controls, and pre-delivery product inspections.

The CE certification is a mandatory market access requirement for the European Union, involving strict testing across multiple dimensions including electrical safety, mechanical safety, and electromagnetic compatibility. All {brand} smart products successfully passed every test category, demonstrating that the products have achieved world-class standards in safety and reliability.

{brand}'s Quality Management Director stated: "Obtaining dual certification is an important achievement of our long-standing quality-first strategy. We have invested substantial resources in building our quality management system, with strict standards and procedures at every step from supplier screening to final product delivery. These certifications are not only a recognition of our existing work but also a driving force for continuous improvement."

{brand} is currently advancing applications for US UL certification and Japan JIS certification, expected to be completed by the end of 2026. Upon completion, the company will have a comprehensive certification system covering all major global markets, providing strong support for further international market expansion.
news_3_summary: After rigorous auditing, {brand}'s full product line passed international quality management and EU safety compliance certifications, providing customers worldwide with more reliable product assurance.

support_faq_cat_1_a1: Consider these factors: 1) Cuisine type - induction blender ranges for Chinese brewing, ovens and processing equipment for Western baking, food processors for fast-casual prep; 2) Daily output - estimate capacity based on daily covers; 3) production footprint - countertop models save space, floor-standing units offer higher throughput; 4) Power supply - confirm whether your site has 220 V or 380 V. Submit your requirements via our Get a Quote page and our engineers will recommend the optimal configuration.
support_faq_cat_1_a2: 220 V (single-phase) suits small food brands, cafés, and food stalls - plugs into standard mains power with easy installation. 380 V (three-phase) is designed for large products manufacturings, central productions, and brand owners where higher power, faster heating, and greater efficiency are needed; requires a certified electrician for installation. Our engineers conduct an on-site power survey before installation if you are unsure.
support_faq_cat_1_a3: Countertop units are compact and flexible, ideal for small productions with limited space; lower daily output and more budget-friendly. Floor-standing units deliver higher capacity and stability for mid-to-large products and central productions, typically with larger bowls and more powerful motors. Recommendation: productions under 30 m2 should prioritize countertop equipment; above 30 m2, choose floor-standing based on throughput needs. We provide complimentary layout planning for full-line configurations.
support_faq_cat_1_a4: Yes. We offer OEM badging and ODM co-development partnerships. Customization covers exterior design, feature configuration, dimensional specifications, and control systems. Typical lead time is 30-60 working days depending on complexity. Contact our sales team via WhatsApp or email to discuss your customization requirements.

Our engineers provide on-site training during installation to ensure your staff can operate proficiently.
support_faq_cat_2_a2: Yes. {brand} smart devices support custom recipe import via USB or Wi-Fi. Contact technical support for the recipe management tool if you need batch import.
support_faq_cat_2_a3: {brand} products equipment is designed for 24/7 continuous operation. We recommend a short rest and cleaning every 8-12 hours to maintain peak performance and extend service life. Built-in overheat protection automatically shuts down the unit if temperature exceeds safe limits; restart after cooling.
support_faq_cat_2_a4: Daily cleaning: Wipe surfaces with a damp cloth after each use; clean interior residue with food-grade cleaner. Daily inspection: Clear filters and drains; check blades and drive components. Weekly maintenance: Lubricate moving parts with food-grade oil; inspect power cables. Monthly deep clean: Fully disassemble and wash internal components; check consumable wear; perform function tests. Refer to the maintenance chapter of your operation manual for detailed schedules.
